A : typeof A == \"string\" && A.endsWith(\"%\") ? (I ?? (I = 1), I * (parseFloat(A) / 100)) : Number.isNaN(parseFloat(A)) ? 0 : parseFloat(A) : 0;\n}\nfunction nA(A) {\n  return typeof A == \"number\" ? \"number\" : A.endsWith(\"%\") ? \"percentage\" : Number.isNaN(parseInt(A, 10)) ? \"keyword\" : \"number\";\n}\nfunction PA(A, I, Q) {\n  return (I[A] - Q[A]) / 2;\n}\nfunction ZI(A, I, Q, n, i) {\n  const o = I === \"percentage\" ? n[Q] - i[Q] : 1;\n  return VA(A) * o;\n}\nfunction ng(A, I, Q) {\n  const [n, i] = A, o = nA(n), D = nA(i), r = { x: void 0, y: void 0 };\n  switch (n) {\n    case \"top\":\n      r.y = 0;\n      break;\n    case \"bottom\":\n      r.y = I.height - Q.height;\n      break;\n    case \"center\":\n      i === \"left\" || i === \"right\" ? r.y = PA(\"height\", I, Q) : r.x = PA(\"width\", I, Q);\n      break;\n    case \"left\":\n      r.x = 0;\n      break;\n    case \"right\":\n      r.x = I.width - Q.width;\n      break;\n    default: {\n      const c = i === \"top\" || i === \"bottom\" || D !== \"keyword\" ? \"width\" : \"height\", l = c === \"width\" ? \"x\" : \"y\";\n      r[l] = ZI(n, o, c, I, Q);\n    }\n  }\n  switch (i) {\n    case \"top\":\n      r.y = 0;\n      break;\n    case \"bottom\":\n      r.y = I.height - Q.height;\n      break;\n    case \"center\":\n      r.y === void 0 ? r.y = PA(\"height\", I, Q) : r.x = PA(\"width\", I, Q);\n      break;\n    case \"left\":\n      r.x = 0;\n      break;\n    case \"right\":\n      r.x = I.width - Q.width;\n      break;\n    default: {\n      const c = r.y === void 0 ? \"y\" : \"x\", l = c === \"y\" ? \"height\" : \"width\";\n      r[c] = ZI(i, D, l, I, Q);\n    }\n  }\n  return r;\n}\nfunction ZA(A, I, Q, n) {\n  const i = A === \"right\" || A === \"bottom\", o = Q === \"percentage\" ? I * n : I;\n  return i ? -o : o;\n}\nfunction jg(A, I, Q) {\n  const [n, i, o, D] = A, r = nA(n), c = nA(i), l = nA(o), R = nA(D);\n  if (c === \"keyword\" || R === \"keyword\")\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid objectPosition value: second and fourth values must be numbers or percentages\");\n  if (r !== \"keyword\" || l !== \"keyword\")\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid objectPosition value: first and third values must be keywords\");\n  const F = ng([n, o], I, Q), u = { ...F }, J = VA(i), Y = VA(D);\n  return n === \"left\" || n === \"right\" ? u.x = F.x + ZA(n, J, c, Q.width) : (n === \"top\" || n === \"bottom\") && (u.y = F.y + ZA(n, J, c, Q.height)), o === \"left\" || o === \"right\" ? u.x = F.x + ZA(o, Y, R, Q.width) : (o === \"top\" || o === \"bottom\") && (u.y = F.y + ZA(o, Y, R, Q.height)), u;\n}\nfunction _g(A, I, Q) {\n  const n = A[0], i = { x: void 0, y: void 0 };\n  switch (n) {\n    case \"top\":\n      i.y = 0, i.x = (I.width - Q.width) / 2;\n      break;\n    case \"bottom\":\n      i.y = I.height - Q.height, i.x = (I.width - Q.width) / 2;\n      break;\n    case \"left\":\n      i.x = 0, i.y = (I.height - Q.height) / 2;\n      break;\n    case \"right\":\n      i.x = I.width - Q.width, i.y = (I.height - Q.height) / 2;\n      break;\n    case \"center\":\n      i.x = (I.width - Q.width) / 2, i.y = (I.height - Q.height) / 2;\n      break;\n    default: {\n      const D = nA(n) === \"percentage\" ? I.width - Q.width : 1;\n      i.x = VA(n) * D, i.y = (I.height - Q.height) / 2;\n    }\n  }\n  return i;\n}\nfunction RI(A, I, Q) {\n  if (!A) return { x: 0, y: 0 };\n  const n = typeof A == \"string\" ? A.split(\" \") : [A];\n  switch (n.length) {\n    case 1:\n      return _g(n, I, Q);\n    case 2:\n      return ng(n, I, Q);\n    case 4:\n      return jg(n, I, Q);\n    default:\n      throw new Error(\"Invalid objectPosition value: must have 1, 2, or 4 values\");\n  }\n}\nconst DI = { width: 0, height: 0 };\nfunction rg(A) {\n  const I = A.target.getLocalBounds(), Q = A.target.scale;\n  return DI.width = Math.abs(I.width * Q.x), DI.height = Math.abs(I.height * Q.y), DI;\n}\nfunction TI(A, I, Q = 0.49) {\n  return Math.abs(A - I) < Q;\n}\nfunction $g(A, I = 0, Q = {}) {\n  let n, i;\n  const o = Q.maxWait ? Y(M) : (n = i = void 0, D);\n  }\n  function aA() {\n    r !== void 0 && v(r), l = 0, n = c = i = r = void 0;\n  }\n  function uA() {\n    return r === void 0 ? D : tA(Date.now());\n  }\n  function LA() {\n    return r !== void 0;\n  }\n  function iA(...M) {\n    const m = Date.now(), K = H(m);\n    if (n = M, i = this, c = m, K) {\n      if (r === void 0)\n        return _(c);\n      if (F)\n        return r = U(X, I), Y(c);\n    }\n    return r === void 0 && (r = U(X, I)), D;\n  }\n  return iA.cancel = aA, iA.flush = uA, iA.pending = LA, iA;\n}\nfunction AB(A, I, Q = {}) {\n  const n = Q.leading ?? !0, i = Q.trailing ?? !0;\n  if (typeof A != \"function\")\n    throw new TypeError(\"Expected a function\");\n  return $g(A, I, {\n    leading: n,\n    trailing: i,\n    maxWait: I\n  });\n}\nvar IB = Object.defineProperty, gB = (A, I, Q) => I in A ?     }\n    }\n    for (let n = 0; n < I.children.length; n++)\n      this._updateSize(I.children[n]);\n  }\n  /**\n   * Updates the layout of the container and its children\n   * @param container - \"stretch\",\n    flexWrap: \"nowrap\",\n    overflow: \"visible\"\n  }\n});\nfunction ag(A, I, Q) {\n  let n = 1, i = 1;\n  switch (A) {\n    case \"fill\":\n      n = I.width / Q.width, i = I.height / Q.height;\n      break;\n    case \"contain\": {\n      const o = Math.min(I.width / Q.width, I.height / Q.height);\n      n = o, i = o;\n      break;\n    }\n    case \"cover\": {\n      const o = Math.max(I.width / Q.width, I.height / Q.height);\n      n = o, i = o;\n      break;\n    }\n    case \"none\":\n      n = 1, i = 1;\n      break;\n    case \"scale-down\": {\n      const o = Math.min(1, I.width / Q.width, I.height / Q.height);\n      n = o, i = o;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n  return {\n    offsetScaleX: n,\n    offsetScaleY: i\n  };\n}\nfunction Dg(A, I, Q, n) {\n  const I + \"\" : I, Q);\nfunction MB(A, I, Q) {\n  const n = Math.round(A[0] + (I[0] - A[0]) * Q), i = Math.round(A[1] + (I[1] - A[1]) * Q), o = Math.round(A[2] + (I[2] - A[2]) * Q);\n  return this.heatGraphics.stroke({ color: u, alpha: Math.max(0.3, c), pixelLine: !0 });\n    }\n    this.position.set(Q.x, Q.y);\n  }\n  /**\n   * Reset the debug object's state\n   */\n  reset() {\n y: r, width: c, height: l } = Q, { x: R, y: F, width: u, height: J } = n;\n    I.rect(D, r, c, l), I.fill({ color: i, alpha: o }), I.rect(R, F, u, J), I.cut();\n  }\n}\nvar UB = Object.defineProperty, HB = (A, I, Q) => I in A ? UB(A, I, { enumerable: !0, configurable: !0, writable: !0, value: Q }) : A[I] = Q, TA = (A, I, Q) => HB(A, typeof I != \"symbol\" ? I + \"\" : I, Q);\nclass LB {\n  constructor() {\n    TA(this, \"holder\", new rA()), TA(this, \"regions\", /* @__PURE__ */ new Map()), TA(this, \"colors\", {\n      [V.Margin]: \"#B68655\",\n      [V.Padding]: \"#BAC57F\",\n      [V.Border]: \"#E7C583\",\n      [V.Content]: \"#89B1BE\",\n      [V.Flex]: \"#6E28D9\"\n    }), TA(this, \"alpha\", 0.75), Object.values(V).forEach((I) => {\n      this.regions.set(I, {\n        outer: new yI(),\n        inner: new yI()\n      });\n    }), this.holder.__devtoolIgnore = !0, this.holder.__devtoolIgnoreChildren = !0, this.holder.eventMode = \"none\", this.holder.interactiveChildren = !1;\n  }\n  /**\n   * Clean up previous render state\n   */\n  reset() {\n    for (let I = this.holder.children.length - 1; I >= 0; I--) {\n      const Q = this.holder.children[I];\n      vI.return(Q);\n    }\n  }\n  /**\n   * Render debug visuals for the given layout\n   */\n  render(I) {\n    FB(I, this.regions);\n    const Q = Object.values(V).reduce(\n      (r, c) => {\n        const l = this.regions.get(c);\n        if (!l) return r;\n        const R = `debugDraw${c.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}${c.slice(1)}`;\n        return r[c] = {\n          ...l,\n          color: this.colors[c],\n          draw: I._styles.custom[R] ?? !0\n        }, r;\n      },\n      {}\n    ), { left: n, top: i } = I.computedLayout, o = I.target.getGlobalPosition(), D = vI.get(kB, {\n      ...Q,\n      target: { x: o.x + n, y: o.y + i },\n      alpha: this.alpha,\n      heat: {\n        invalidationCount: I._modificationCount,\n        draw: I._styles.custom.debugHeat !== !1\n      },\n      heatOnly: !I._styles.custom.debug\n    });\n    this.holder.addChildAt(D, 0);\n  }\n  /**\n   * Clean up the debug renderer\n   */\n  destroy() {\n    this.reset(), this.holder.destroy(), this.regions.clear();\n  }\n}\nconst JB = /* @__PURE__ */ Object.freeze(/* @__PURE__ */ Object.defineProperty({\n  __proto__: null,\n  DebugRenderer: LB\n}, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: \"Module\" }));\nzA.add(sg);\nexport {\n  LB as DebugRenderer,\n  RA as Layout,\n  sg as LayoutSystem,\n  DB as applyStyle,\n  hB as formatStyles,\n  VA as getNumberFromStyle,\n  rg as getPixiSize,\n  nA as getTypeFromStyle,\n  og as getYoga,\n  zg as getYogaConfig,\n  TI as nearlyEqual,\n  cB as onChildAdded,\n  yB as onChildRemoved,\n  qg as setYoga,\n  Vg as setYogaConfig\n};\n//# sourceMappingURL=index-DaGekQUW.js.map\n"],"mappings":";;;;;AACA,IAAI,YAAY;CACd,IAAI,IAAI,OAAO,KAAK;AACpB,SAAQ,SAAS,GAAG;AAClB,MAAI,KAAK,EAAE;EACX,IAAI;AACJ,QAAM,IAAI,OAAO,IAAI,MAAM,IAAI,EAAE;EACjC,IAAI,GAAG;AACP,IAAE,QAAQ,IAAI,QAAQ,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACnC,OAAI,GAAG,IAAI;IACX;EACF,IAAI,IAAI,OAAO,OAAO,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,IAAI;AAClC,SAAO,WAAW,OAAO,SAAS,kBAAkB,IAAI,SAAS,cAAc,MAAM,MAAM,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,QAAQ,QAAQ,KAAK,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,OAAO,GAAG,EAAE,QAAQ,UAAU,GAAG,CAAC,YAAY,IAAI,GAAG,EAAE,GAAG,IAAI;EAClM,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,SAAS,QAAQ,IAAI,KAAK,QAAQ,EAAE,IAAI,EAAE,YAAY,QAAQ,KAAK,KAAK,QAAQ;AAC1F,SAAO,OAAO,GAAG,EAAE,EAAE,IAAI;EACzB,IAAI;AACJ,IAAE,eAAe,IAAI,EAAE,aAAa,EAAE,eAAe,OAAO,eAAe,YAAY,GAAG,kCAAkC;EAC5H,IAAI,GAAG,IAAI,CAAC;EACZ,SAAS,EAAE,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG;AAClB,OAAI,IAAI;AACR,QAAK,IAAI,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,KAAK,KAAM;IAC5B,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE;AACV,QAAI,CAAC,EAAG;AACR,QAAI,IAAI,KAAK;KACX,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,OAAO;AACjB,UAAK,IAAI,QAAQ,IAAK,MAAK,OAAO,cAAc,IAAI,OAAO,IAAI,EAAE;UAC5D;MACH,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,OAAO;AACjB,WAAK,IAAI,QAAQ,OAAO,IAAI,OAAO,KAAK,KAAK,IAAI,KAAK,IAAI,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK,KAAK,KAAK,IAAI,EAAE,OAAO,IAAI,QAAQ,IAAI,KAAK,OAAO,aAAa,EAAE,IAAI,KAAK,OAAO,KAAK,OAAO,aAAa,QAAQ,KAAK,IAAI,QAAQ,IAAI,KAAK;;UAEpN,MAAK,OAAO,aAAa,EAAE;;AAEpC,UAAO;;EAET,IAAI,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG,GAAG;EAC5B,SAAS,KAAK;GACZ,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE;AACV,OAAI,GAAG,EAAE,QAAQ,IAAI,IAAI,UAAU,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,SAAS,IAAI,IAAI,WAAW,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,SAAS,IAAI,IAAI,WAAW,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,SAAS,IAAI,IAAI,WAAW,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,UAAU,IAAI,IAAI,YAAY,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,UAAU,IAAI,IAAI,YAAY,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,UAAU,IAAI,IAAI,aAAa,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,UAAU,KAAK,IAAI,aAAa,EAAE;;EAEhS,IAAI,IAAI,KAAK,EAAE,EAAE,KAAK,EAAE,EAAE,IAAI,EAAE;EAChC,SAAS,IAAI;GACX,IAAI,IAAI,EAAE,OAAO,OAAO;AACxB,MAAG,QAAQ,EAAE;;EAEf,IAAI,IAAI,GAAG,KAAK;EAChB,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACb,SAAM,EAAE,WAAW,EAAE,QAAQ,EAAE,EAAE,IAAI,aAAa,IAAI,KAAK,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,IAAI,CAAC,GAAG,IAAI,IAAI,YAAY,aAAa,IAAI,2CAA2C,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE,EAAE;;EAEnK,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACb,UAAO,EAAE,WAAW,wCAAwC;;EAE9D,IAAI;AACJ,MAAI,IAAI,y86FAAy86F,CAAC,G
